Defines font resource keys for various font styles and sizes in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This file is a C header file that defines a series of preprocessor macros for font resource identifiers. Each macro associates a human-readable font key with a corresponding resource ID string. These macros are used to reference specific font resources within an application, facilitating the management and retrieval of font assets by their identifiers. The file is autogenerated by a script, as indicated by the comments, and should not be manually modified. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
